rationale: Acting on Review 1's two findings produces the better result: its camelCase vs. snake_case field inconsistency (finiteType/geomReduced vs. unipotent_radical_trivial/radical_trivial) and the mixed-case gratuitous-prime lemma name are directly verifiable naming violations in the exact diff and would be fixed to uniform style; Review 2 misses the case issue entirely, requires debatable Is- renames on the principal classes (internally consistent with how ReductiveGroup etc. are used), and relies on an unverifiable external 'roadmap' for AlgPoints.
